purpose: Cross-validate a plan/proposal: base summary -> validator finds risks -> ESCALATE to revalidator on >=3 substantive risks or uncertainty.

tiers.purpose: neutral summary + strengths (supplied by the calling agent — Claude IS the base tier; no proxy call)

factcheck.purpose: optional web fact-check of external claims

escalation.rule: If the validator raises >=3 substantive RISK lines OR sets UNCERTAIN, escalate to the revalidator. Fewer risks and no uncertainty MUST NOT escalate.

confidence.rule: Clean (no escalation, validator concurs) = HIGH; escalated = MEDIUM/LOW depending on the revalidator. Confidence is INTER-MODEL AGREEMENT, never a claim of correctness.

note: FIXED scope (WORKING_METHOD §1): the escalation threshold (>=3 risks) is declared here, not chosen per run. _chain.mjs reads it.
